---
name: Code improvement
about: Suggest a code quality, refactoring, or performance improvement
title: '[IMPROVE] '
labels: 'code quality, help wanted'
assignees: ''

---

**Which area of the codebase does this affect?**
Provide file paths or module names (e.g., `src/agents/executor_agent.py`, `src/utils/`).

**What is the current behavior or problem?**
A clear description of the code smell, technical debt, or performance issue.

**Proposed improvement**
Describe the refactoring or improvement you'd like to see.

**Impact**
How will this improvement benefit the project? (e.g., maintainability, performance, readability)

**Are you willing to submit a PR?**
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to work on this
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting

**Additional context**
Add any code snippets, benchmarks, or references that support the improvement.
